entity.summary: Arbitrum decentralized exchange entity consolidating V2 and V3 registry representations, with residual liquidity and fee activity but no recent recorded DEX volume.
entity.notes: Current protocol data preserves the Arbitrum Exchange identity, residual TVL, and small recent fee activity, while 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume are reported as zero. HEI consolidates V2 and V3 rows into one entity and uses limited rather than active or dead. A stable first-party application URL was not promoted in this review pass.

evidence.title: Arbitrum Exchange combined protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current combined protocol data preserves Arbitrum Exchange and identifies the V2 and V3 exchange components.

evidence.title: Arbitrum Exchange V2 and V3 discovery entries
evidence.notes: DEX discovery data preserves separate V2 and V3 rows; HEI consolidates them under one entity-first Arbitrum Exchange record.

evidence.title: Arbitrum Exchange protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Residual liquidity and fee activity remain, but recent DEX-volume windows are zero, supporting a limited classification.
